name: Passover Glazed Chicken with Matzo-Nut Stuffi
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion, celery, and nuts in shortening until the vegetables are tender.
2. Add the broken matzos to the skillet and toast lightly.
3. In a large bowl, combine salt, pepper, egg, condensed chicken soup, and orange rind.
4. Add the matzo mixture to the bowl and mix well.
5. Stuff the 4 lb. chicken with the matzo-nut mixture.
6. Place the bird on a rack in an open roasting pan with the breast side down for the first half of the cooking time.
7. Prepare the glaze by combining orange juice, grated orange rind, honey, and shortening in a bowl.
8. Pour the glaze over the chicken.
9. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for about 2 to 2½ hours, or until browned and tender. Baste with the glaze every 20 minutes.
